items.title: Exodus, Ondo launch tokenized markets with 200-plus stocks and ETFs on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of tokenized markets on Solana enhances liquidity and expands investment options, potentially attracting more users to the ecosystem.

items.title: Ethena Labs to allocate $250 million to Securitize’s Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as it deploys on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Ethena Labs' significant investment in a tokenized fund on Solana signals growing institutional interest and could bolster the platform's credibility and usage.

items.title: How $48 mln vanished from Tron to Monero before Tether could stop it
items.whyYouShouldCare: The incident involving the transfer of funds highlights vulnerabilities in blockchain security, which could impact user trust and liquidity across platforms, including Solana.
